entry.title: Packrift Authority Gateway Registry
entry.summary: Codex built, deployed, publicly verified, and submitted the Packrift Authority Gateway Registry at `https://packrift-authority-gateway-registry.vercel.app/`.

entry.title: Packrift Contribution Status Gateway
entry.summary: Codex ran a targeted public GitHub pending-queue readback, then built, deployed, publicly verified, and submitted a compact Packrift Contribution Status Gateway at `https://packrift-contribution-status-gateway.vercel.app/`.

entry.title: Packrift GitHub Pages API Directory Gateway
entry.summary: Codex built, deployed, publicly verified, and submitted a compact Packrift GitHub Pages API Directory Gateway at `https://packrift-github-pages-api-gateway.vercel.app/`.
